infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: TruthScope uses the camera to measure physiological signals like heart rate through photoplethysmography (PPG) and to analyze facial micro-expressions during lie detection sessions.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: TruthScope uses the microphone to perform voice stress analysis, detecting changes in vocal pitch, tremor, and other acoustic features during lie detection sessions.

plugins.cameraPermission: TruthScope uses the camera to measure your heart rate via fingertip photoplethysmography and to track facial micro-expressions for deception analysis.
plugins.microphonePermission: TruthScope uses the microphone for voice stress analysis during lie detection sessions.
